'''Dessourt''' is one of the bosses fought during [[Recipe for Disaster]]. He resembles [[Dessous]] from [[Desert Treasure I]], but made of sweets. He is most vulnerable to [[Magic]] and fairly weak to [[Ranged]] and [[stab]]. He is resistant to [[slash]] and [[crush]].

He can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete.

==Strategy==
Similar to his Desert Treasure I counterpart, he uses a rapid and fairly strong [[melee]] attack, as well as a Magic attack that always hits 5s. The most efficient way to kill him is by using melee-resistant armour such as [[Barrows equipment|Barrows]] and attack with Magic; [[Trident of the seas]]/[[Trident of the swamp|swamp]] or [[Iban Blast]] are effective.

'''Note''': The player '''cannot''' use [[Prayer]] in this boss fight or any other [[Recipe for Disaster]] boss fight.
